description: mcpevals.io is the website for MCP Evals, a Node.js package and GitHub Action used to evaluate Model Context Protocol tool implementations with LLM-based scoring. The site provides product documentation and blog content about MCP tooling and related topics.
summary: mcpevals.io exposes a public npm-distributed CLI/package surface (`mcp-eval` via the `mcp-evals` package); no public HTTP API, GraphQL API, or MCP server endpoint was found on the domain.
